title: New additions to API version 2024-01

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We recently added a new field, argument, and mutation related to teams in version 2024-01 Check out each update below!

  • New team_owners_subscribers field on workspaces queries
  • New delete_teams_from_board mutation
  • New kind argument on add_teams_to_board
